response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume shows little alignment with the core requirements of this role. There is no demonstrated Spring/Hibernate/Quarkus experience, no IDE-internals or language-tooling background beyond brief C/C++ work on LabWindows/CVI a decade ago, and Java/Kotlin appear only as secondary skills with no deep JVM work. Primary expertise is in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which are not the focus of this position.
strengths: Strong software-craftsmanship mindset (TDD, CI/CD, testable architectures)
Prior IDE-adjacent experience contributing to LabWindows/CVI in C/C++
Proven ability to work across complex, large-scale systems and diverse stacks
concerns: No demonstrable Spring, Hibernate, or Quarkus experience
Java/Kotlin listed only as general skills, no deep JVM or Kotlin project history
No recent language-tooling or IDE-internals work relevant to enterprise JVM tooling

key_factors.factor: No IDE internals / language tooling track record
